fewShots.question: What is our overall 30-day readmission rate?
Show readmission rate by encounter type.
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(fact_encounter[encounter_type], "Encounters", [Total Encounters], "Readmission Rate", [Readmission Rate], "High Risk", [High Risk Readmissions]) ORDER BY [Readmission Rate] DESC

fewShots.question: Show the monthly readmission rate trend for the last year.
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_date[year], dim_date[month_number], dim_date[month_name], "Encounters", [Total Encounters], "Readmission Rate", [Readmission Rate]) ORDER BY dim_date[year], dim_date[month_number]

fewShots.question: What is medication adherence by drug class?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(agg_medication_adherence[drug_class], "PDC Score", [Avg PDC Score], "Adherent %", [Adherent Rate]) ORDER BY [Avg PDC Score] DESC

fewShots.question: Which providers are exceeding their RVU targets?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(20, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_provider[display_name], dim_provider[specialty], "RVU Target", [Avg RVU Target], "Actual RVU", [Avg Actual RVU], "Attainment %", [RVU Attainment %]), [RVU Attainment %], DESC)

fewShots.question: Show me a quality scorecard by provider specialty.
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_provider[specialty], "Providers", [Total Providers], "Board Cert %", [Board Certified Rate], "Satisfaction", [Avg Satisfaction Score], "Documentation", [Avg Documentation Score], "Value-Based %", [Value-Based Provider Rate]) ORDER BY [Avg Satisfaction Score] DESC

fewShots.question: Which DRGs have the worst margins?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(15, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(fact_encounter[drg_code], fact_encounter[drg_description], "Encounters", [Total Encounters], "Charges", [Total Charges], "Cost", [Total Cost], "Margin", [DRG Margin]), [DRG Margin], ASC)

fewShots.question: How is telehealth adoption trending year over year?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_date[year], "Encounters", [Total Encounters], "Telehealth", [Telehealth Encounters], "Telehealth %", [Telehealth Rate], "Charges", [Total Charges], "YoY %", [YoY Charge Growth]) ORDER BY dim_date[year]

fewShots.question: How does SDOH risk tier correlate with readmissions?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_sdoh[risk_tier], "Patients", [Total Patients], "High Risk SDOH", [High Risk SDOH Patients], "Readmission Rate", [Readmission Rate], "Charges", [Total Charges]) ORDER BY [Readmission Rate] DESC

fewShots.question: What is our chronic condition burden?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE { ("Total Patients", [Total Patients]), ("Chronic Patients", [Chronic Patients]), ("Chronic Rate", [Chronic Rate]), ("Patients With Chronic Conditions", [Patients with Chronic Conditions]), ("Avg PDC", [Avg PDC Score]) }

fewShots.question: Are providers at panel capacity?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_provider[specialty], "Providers", [Total Providers], "Avg Panel", [Avg Panel Size], "Actual", [Actual Panel Count], "Utilization %", [Panel Utilization %]) ORDER BY [Panel Utilization %] DESC

fewShots.question: What are the most common chronic diagnoses?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(15, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_diagnosis[icd_code], dim_diagnosis[icd_description], dim_diagnosis[icd_category], "Diagnoses", [Unique Diagnoses], "Patients", [Patients with Chronic Conditions]), [Patients with Chronic Conditions], DESC)
